title: Moderation Update – 2026-04-20
body: The moderation team processed 6 reports from the abuse queue today. Two accounts were banned: one for high-severity phishing spam (posting malicious links across multiple channels) and one for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers. One account received a formal warning for suspicious automated behavior in help channels. Two reports involving trusted community volunteers were reviewed and closed without sanction, as policy requires escalation review rather than direct action for those roles. One low-severity formatting report was closed with no action required. We remain committed to keeping this community safe and welcoming.
